misc.title: Kulübümüzün 4 yıllık anlaşmaya vardığı yeni transferimiz İngiliz futbolcu Mason Greenwood, Profesyonel Futbol A Takımımızın çalışmalarına katılmak üzere yarın İstanbul’a gelecektir. Mason Greenwood’u
misc.text: Kulübümüzün 4 yıllık anlaşmaya vardığı yeni transferimiz İngiliz futbolcu Mason Greenwood, Profesyonel Futbol A Takımımızın çalışmalarına katılmak üzere yarın İstanbul’a gelecektir. Mason Greenwood’u ve ailesini taşıyan uçak, yarın saat 16.50’de İstanbul Havalimanı Dış Hatlar Terminali’ne iniş yapacaktır. Fenerbahçe taraftarının ve kamuoyunun bilgisine sunarız.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 How similar their abilities are. Usually the sun god should have fire powers too, alongside creating things out of nowhere with the Hagoromo. Maybe Luffy next big power is the fire abili
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 How similar their abilities are. Usually the sun god should have fire powers too, alongside creating things out of nowhere with the Hagoromo. Maybe Luffy next big power is the fire ability.🤔

misc.title: Microsoft DELETED my account AND OneDrive!!?? After ACKNOWLEDGING that I’m the owner of the account and that it was compromised??? 25 fucking years of data, thousands of euros spended on games?? My so
misc.text: Microsoft DELETED my account AND OneDrive!!?? After ACKNOWLEDGING that I’m the owner of the account and that it was compromised??? 25 fucking years of data, thousands of euros spended on games?? My son’s baby pictures? GONE! All because MICROSOFT couldn’t bring back a compromised account?? One of the biggest companies ever coulnd’t do that so they just deleted that shit like it was nothing?? Fucking shame on you!! @microsoftnl @MicrosoftHelps @MicrosoftHelpt @Microsoft #microsoft #hacked

misc.title: Its crazy cause im sure this type of thing happens all the time, this guy is just a creator so his voice is louder than the thoudands of people I would presume it happens to everyday Joshua Khane (@Jo
misc.text: Its crazy cause im sure this type of thing happens all the time, this guy is just a creator so his voice is louder than the thoudands of people I would presume it happens to everyday Joshua Khane (@JoshuaKhane) Microsoft DELETED my account AND OneDrive!!?? After ACKNOWLEDGING that I’m the owner of the account and that it was compromised??? 25 fucking years of data, thousands of euros spended on games?? My son’s baby pictures? GONE! All because MICROSOFT couldn’t bring back a compromised account?? One of the biggest companies ever coulnd’t do that so they just deleted that shit like it was nothing?? Fucking shame on you!! @microsoftnl @MicrosoftHelps @MicrosoftHelpt @Microsoft #microsoft #hacked — https://nitter.net/JoshuaKhane/status/2076918699248803977#m

misc.text: Del 21 al 24 de agosto, tendrá lugar en #NintendoSwitch2 el «Network Test», una prueba de red de The Duskbloods. Desde el 22 de julio, se puede solicitar la participación. ¡Esperamos que los aspirantes a Conversos de Sangre se animen a participar en las batallas crepusculares!

items.text: Microsoft DELETED my account AND OneDrive!!?? After ACKNOWLEDGING that I’m the owner of the account and that it was compromised??? 25 fucking years of data, thousands of euros spended on games?? My son’s baby pictures? GONE! Fucking shame on you!! @microsoftnl @MicrosoftHelps @MicrosoftHelpt @Microsoft #microsoft #hacked
